data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Opt-out handling with audit trail', but the evidence does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the implementation of opt-out handling or the existence of an audit trail. The linked use case mentions the need for opt-out handling but lacks concrete evidence that this requirement is satisfied, indicating a clear gap in the validation process. Specifically, there are no details on how opt-out requests are processed or logged, which is essential for confirming compliance with this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of opt-out handling and the existence of an audit trail.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for opt-out handling
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the implementation of opt-out handling and audit trail.
